[property]
gpu-id=0

# Absolute paths to ONNX and compiled TRT engine.
# The engine is auto-generated on first run (~2 min, same as PeopleNet).
# /nx_tech is the repo mount point inside the container (docker-compose.yml).
# model-engine-file must match DeepStream's auto-generated name exactly
# (<onnx>_b<batch-size>_gpu<gpu-id>_<network-mode>.engine) or it rebuilds
# from scratch on every restart instead of loading the cached engine.
onnx-file=/nx_tech/models/osnet/osnet_x1_0_market1501.onnx
model-engine-file=/nx_tech/models/osnet/osnet_x1_0_market1501.onnx_b8_gpu0_fp32.engine

# ImageNet normalization: output_c = (pixel_c - mean_c*255) / (std_c*255)
# DeepStream formula: output = (pixel - offset) * net_scale_factor
# mean=[0.485,0.456,0.406], std=[0.229,0.224,0.225] (per-channel std ~0.226 avg)
# offsets = mean * 255 per channel (R, G, B)
# net-scale-factor = 1 / (255 * avg_std) ≈ 0.01737
net-scale-factor=0.01737
offsets=123.675;116.28;103.53
model-color-format=0

# FP32 for stable first deployment. Try network-mode=2 (FP16) after verifying
# embeddings are coherent — DeepStream handles FP16 differently than ONNX Runtime.
network-mode=0

# network-type=1 = other (not a classifier or detector — just extracts the output tensor).
# output-tensor-meta=1 exposes the tensor via NvDsInferTensorMeta so the probe can read it.
network-type=1
output-blob-names=output
output-tensor-meta=1
force-implicit-batch-dim=0
batch-size=8

# process-mode=2 = SGIE (runs on object crops from the PGIE).
# operate-on-gie-id=1 = PeopleNet. operate-on-class-ids=0 = class 0 (person), not class 2 (face).
process-mode=2
operate-on-gie-id=1
operate-on-class-ids=0

# gie-unique-id=3 — 1=PeopleNet, 2=AgeGender, 3=OSNet (previously reserved for FaceDetectIR).
# The probe uses this to filter the correct tensor from obj_user_meta_list.
gie-unique-id=3

# interval=0 runs OSNet on every frame (no frame skipping).
# Minimum bbox size for DeepStream to pass the crop to the SGIE. Raised from 32x32:
# the model expects 256x128 native input, and people below this size produce noisy
# embeddings that pollute the ReID gallery. Below this threshold, DeepStream never
# invokes the SGIE at all — the deadline fallback in probes.py's
# _handle_appearance_reid emits person_entry with global_id=None instead, which is
# excluded from person_count, cross-camera ReID, face recognition, and positions.
interval=0
input-object-min-width=96
input-object-min-height=192
